sections.paragraph:
m. pl.-

(1) virginity, Lev 21:13, זִהוּא אִשָּׂה בִבְתוּלֶיהָ יִקַּח “and he shall take a wife in her virginity;” Jud. 11:37 Eze 23:3, דַּדֵּי בְתוּלֵיהֶן “the teats of their virginity,” verse Eze 23:3.

(2) tokens of virginity (compare בְּרִית No. 4, of the sign of the covenant), i.e. stragulæ inter primæ noctis amplexus hymenis scissi sanguine inquinatæ. Deu 22:14, seq. Compare Leo Afric. p. 325. Niebuhr’s Description of Arabia, p. 35-39. Arvieux, Itin. vol. iii. p. 257, 260. Michaëlis, Mosaisches Recht, t. ii. § 92.
